ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "game_count" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "win_count" INTEGER /* Total number of wins contributed by the player */,
  "win_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team that played */,
  "opponent_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Final score of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each opponent team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League of the opponent team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_points" (
  "fantasy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy points record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored by the player */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the year */,
  "average_points" REAL /* Average points scored per game in that year */,
  "average_rebounds" REAL /* Average rebounds per game in that year */,
  "average_assists" REAL /* Average assists per game in that year */,
  "shooting_percentage" REAL /* Shooting percentage in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g. Guard, Forward, Center) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_roles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "standings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standings record */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "win_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points for the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points against the team */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current winning or losing streak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

ID of the team the player belongs to
Total number of games played by the player
